title: BDRY - September 27, 2022
summary: A September to remember for Capesizes, but what will October bring? - Shipping is all about seasonality and, once Some revival in China's real estate sector should be expected in the near term - We think the worst is behind us Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
